_comment: River Bankers structure-deck card data. 44 main-deck cards (excludes species starter cards). Source: sim.js STRUCT_CARDS table. Effect prose copied verbatim; vp=0 cards print VP as ★ since their scoring lives in the effect text.

cards.name: Beaver Dam
cards.effect: When built, wash one card of your choice from River 1 to the shoreline (workers carry along).

cards.name: Hollowed-out Log
cards.effect: When you pass 0 on the fish track, recall one worker from a river card without dropping a blank.

cards.name: Snag Pile
cards.effect: When built, pull a Headwaters card to River 1 for free; an auction immediately runs on it at 1 fish/item.

cards.name: Heron Watch
cards.effect: End game: +1 VP per shoreline card on the table (max +6).

cards.name: Reed Bed
cards.effect: Reed icons cost you 1 less fish per item (min 1).

cards.name: Mud Levee
cards.effect: When built, drop 2 blanks on uncovered icons in the river.

cards.name: Otter Slide
cards.effect: When you build, advance 3 fewer fish (min 1).

cards.name: Cache Burrow
cards.effect: Your hand size is 4 instead of 3.

cards.name: Vine Lattice
cards.effect: When built, draw 3 structure cards, keep 1, discard 2.

cards.name: Charcoal Pit
cards.effect: When building, 1 of your Clay workers may substitute for any other material.

cards.name: Lookout Tree
cards.effect: Peek at the top card of the material deck at any time.

cards.name: Pier
cards.effect: End game: +2 VP per shoreline card with at least one of your workers.

cards.name: Cattail Marsh
cards.effect: Each Reed worker you spend on a build counts as 2 reeds.

cards.name: Wood Pile
cards.effect: When you pass 0 on the fish track, claim 1 uncovered Log icon from any river card for 1 fish.

cards.name: Heron Roost
cards.effect: At the start of your turn you may pay 1 fish to replace a Headwaters card with the top of the material deck.

cards.name: Otter Raft
cards.effect: When a jammed auction makes you place fewer workers than your bid, pay fish for one fewer worker.

cards.name: Mill Wheel
cards.effect: When you would pass 0 on the fish track, stop at space 1 instead.

cards.name: Stone Pool
cards.effect: When built, look at the top 5 material cards and rearrange them in any order.

cards.name: Flush Channel
cards.effect: When built, discard 1 Headwaters card of your choice (out of game) and refill that slot from the top of the material deck. No auction.

cards.name: Granary
cards.effect: Once per game, your build costs 1 fewer of one listed material (your choice).

cards.name: Royal Lodge
cards.effect: When built, take an immediate extra turn.

cards.name: Otter Den
cards.effect: When you recall workers before an auction, slide back 1 fish per worker recalled.

cards.name: Floodgate
cards.effect: Once per game, before an auction resolves, slide the auctioned card 1 space toward the Headwaters.

cards.name: Burrow Run
cards.effect: When built, slide your pawn back 5 on the fish track.

cards.name: Sap Drip
cards.effect: When built, place 2 free workers from your supply onto uncovered icons of one river card.

cards.name: Spy Mound
cards.effect: Once per game, decide your auction bid after the other players reveal theirs.

cards.name: Vine Ladder
cards.effect: End game: +4 VP per built structure of yours that uses Vines (max +12).

cards.name: Vine Trellis
cards.effect: When you build a structure that uses Vines, slide back 1 fish on the fish track. End game: +2 VP per built structure of yours that uses Vines.

cards.name: Stone Causeway
cards.effect: When you build a structure that uses Stones, draw 1 structure card and discard 1 from your hand. End game: +2 VP per built structure of yours that uses Stones (max +8).

cards.name: Reed Walkway
cards.effect: When you build a structure that uses Reeds, place 1 free worker from your supply onto an uncovered icon on a River 1 card. End game: +2 VP per built structure of yours that uses Reeds.

cards.name: Clay Vault
cards.effect: When you build a structure that uses Clay, look at the top card of the structure deck; you may swap it with 1 card from your hand. End game: +3 VP per built structure of yours that uses Clay (max +12).

cards.name: Burrow Network
cards.effect: When you build a structure that uses Mud, move one of your workers from any river card to another river card containing at least one of your workers (you may replace a blank instead of taking an uncovered icon). End game: +3 VP per built structure of yours that uses Mud (max +9).

cards.name: Driftwood Snag
cards.effect: At the start of your turn you may pay 1 fish to add a blank to any uncovered icon.

cards.name: Salt Lick
cards.effect: When built, look at every opponent's hand of structure cards.

cards.name: Hidden Cache
cards.effect: End game: +3 VP per 2 distinct materials in your built structures (max +9).

cards.name: Treaty Stone
cards.effect: When building, you may spend 2 of any one material as 1 of any other material. Once per build.

cards.name: Cattail Patch
cards.effect: End game: VP equal to 1/1/2/3/5/8 for 1/2/3/4/5/6 distinct materials across your built structures.

cards.name: Pack Rat Burrow
cards.effect: When you pass 0 on the fish track, you may discard 1 structure from your hand and take a structure of your choice from the discard pile.

cards.name: Tribute Stone
cards.effect: Once per game, at the start of your turn, force an opponent to recall one of their workers from a river card (dropping a blank). The opponent slides back 3 fish in compensation.

cards.name: Beaver Tow
cards.effect: On your turn, instead of a regular action, pay 2 fish to slide a river card 1 space toward the Headwaters.

cards.name: Otter Trail
cards.effect: At the start of your turn, swap one of your workers on a river card with another worker (yours or an opponent's) on a different river card. Pay the source card's per-item cost in fish.

cards.name: Salmon Run
cards.effect: As your main action, place 1-5 workers from your supply onto uncovered icons of one river card. Fish cost escalates 1/2/3/5/8 per successive worker.

cards.name: Slipstream
cards.effect: Once per game, take a turn immediately after another player takes their turn, even if you are not next on the fish track.
